## FacetsProvider class

This component allows to provide facets by prop, to add them to the state of the `Facets X-Module`<!-- -->. These facets will be added to the `Facets X-Module` state together with the facets emitted by the `Search X-Module` through the [SearchXEvents.FacetsChanged](./x-components.searchxevents.facetschanged.md) event.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class FacetsProvider extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [groupId](./x-components.facetsprovider.groupid.md) |  | [GroupId](./x-components.groupid.md) | An facet group identifier to distinguish the provided facets from other facets like the <code>Search X-Module</code> facets. |

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [provideFacets()](./x-components.facetsprovider.providefacets.md) |  | Emits the [FacetsXEvents.FacetsGroupProvided](./x-components.facetsxevents.facetsgroupprovided.md) event with the  as payload. It also extracts and saves the selected filters. |
|  [render()](./x-components.facetsprovider.render.md) |  |  |
